summary: The SwingRatings algorithm indicates that LIN is currently testing its Daily 50MA support zone near $512.68. Based on historical price action, bounces from this level have yielded a win rate of 17.4%. The asset has recently tested this support 4 time(s), which may have partially consumed buy-side liquidity. In the event of a successful bounce, traders should monitor overhead supply, particularly a primary horizontal resistance at $521.68. This setup presents a structured risk-reward profile for swing positioning.
